name: National Institutes of Health
description: Primary funding agency through NIH/NIAID/OCICB supporting ACE Uganda's infrastructure, research and training since 2015.

name: NIAID / OCICB
description: The Office of Cyber Infrastructure and Computational Biology within NIAID provides ongoing technical and financial support.

name: Makerere University
description: Host institution — the Colleges of Health Sciences and Computing & Information Sciences are the academic homes of ACE Uganda.

name: Infectious Diseases Institute
description: Co-founding partner housed at Makerere University. ACE Uganda's physical offices are located in the IDI-McKinnell Knowledge Centre.

name: CAfGEN Project
description: Collaborative HIV research network across sub-Saharan Africa working closely with ACE Uganda on genomic studies.

name: RENU
description: Research and Education Network of Uganda — provides the 10 Gbps NREN connectivity linking ACE to global research networks.

name: African Research Universities Alliance
description: Pan-African academic alliance that facilitates collaborative research, graduate training and staff mobility across member universities.

name: Google DeepMind
description: Strategic AI research partnership established in 2023, providing access to state-of-the-art machine learning resources and collaborative research programmes.
